record_types.name: EVENTS_ERROR_Register
EVENTS_METADATAREAD_Register
EVENTS_PROVISIONED_Register
EVENTS_PUSHBLOCKED_Register
EVENTS_PUSHED_Register
EVENTS_REVOKED_Register
KEYSLOT_Register
KMU_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_REVOKE
fields.description: Read key slot metadata into METADATA register

fields.name: TASKS_READMETADATA
fields.description:
Block only the PUSH operation of a key slot, preventing the key slot
from being PUSHED until next reset. The task is kept for backwards
compatibility.

fields.name: EVENTS_PUSHED
fields.description: Key slot has been revoked and can no longer be used

fields.name: EVENTS_REVOKED
fields.description:
Error generated during PROVISION, PUSH, READMETADATA or REVOKE
operations. Triggering the PROVISION, PUSH and REVOKE tasks on a
BLOCKED keyslot will also generate this event.

fields.name: EVENTS_ERROR
fields.description: Key slot metadata has been read into METADATA register

fields.name: EVENTS_METADATAREAD
fields.description:
The PUSHBLOCK operation was successful. The event is kept for
backwards compatibility.

fields.name: STATUS
fields.description: Select key slot to operate on

fields.name: SRC
fields.description: Key slot metadata as read by TASKS_READMETADATA.
